form.label: AWS Traffic by Protocol and Port (DEPRECATED)

search.query: `basesearch_20267("$nfo_hostname$","$vpc_id$","$advanced_filter$","$src_inst_name$","$src_port$","$dest_inst_name$","$dest_port$","$protocol_name$","$span_token$")` | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | `format_port_column(app_port_string, app_port)`

chart.title: AWS Traffic by Protocol and Port

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname vpc_id vpc_name sum_by_vpc app_port_string _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname vpc_id vpc_name sum_by_vpc app_port_string | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_vpc | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | eval vpc_name_id = vpc_name ."/". vpc_id | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname vpc_name_id app_port_string "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename vpc_name_id as "VPC name/id" | rename app_port_string as "Application Port" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20267` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" vpc_id="$vpc_id$" | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_vpc by vpc_id nfo_hostname | search $advanced_filter$ | fillnull value="" transport src_host src_inst_id src_inst_name dest_host dest_inst_id dest_inst_name | search (src_inst_name="$src_inst_name$" OR src_ip="$src_inst_name$") (dest_inst_name="$dest_inst_name$" OR dest_ip="$dest_inst_name$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | search transport="$protocol_name$" | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count by nfo_hostname vpc_id src_ip src_inst_id src_inst_name src_port src_host dest_ip dest_inst_id dest_inst_name dest_port dest_host transport vpc_name sum_by_vpc _time | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | `format_port_column(app_port_string, app_port)` | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname vpc_id vpc_name sum_by_vpc app_port_string _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname vpc_id vpc_name sum_by_vpc app_port_string | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_vpc | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | eval vpc_name_id = vpc_name ."/". vpc_id | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname vpc_name_id app_port_string "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename vpc_name_id as "VPC name/id" | rename app_port_string as "Application Port" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: AWS Traffic for Application Port and Protocol for $submitted:Application Port$ reported by NFO:$NFO$ VPC:$submitted:VPC_ID$
AWS Traffic for Application Port and Protocol for $submitted:Application Port$ reported by NFO:$NFO$ VPC:$submitted:VPC_ID$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20267` vpc_id="$VPC_ID$" nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_vpc by vpc_id nfo_hostname | search $advanced_filter$ | search (src_inst_name="$src_inst_name$" OR src_ip="$src_inst_name$") (dest_inst_name="$dest_inst_name$" OR dest_ip="$dest_inst_name$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | `format_port_column(app_port_string, app_port)` | search app_port_string="$Application Port$" | `aws_conversation(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10267: AWS Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20267). This Module identifies AWS EC2 instances with the most traffic. It consolidates VPC Flow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. This Module is packaged in NFO “AWS VPC Flow Logs” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
